description: Report monthly/quarterly maintainers for a file's co-change community over time (read-only).
rules: read-only — reads DATA_DIR artifacts (cochange.graph.json/ownership.graph.json/communities.json + commits.jsonl); reads git log only if commits.jsonl is missing
locate the community via --file or --community-id in CM_ARGS
buckets touches by month (default) or quarter; supports recency weighting and bot filtering
CSV result is written to record_store/community_maintainers.csv
usage: Set DATA_DIR (a built ownership-map dir with communities + commits.jsonl) and CM_ARGS (e.g. `--file network/card.c --since 2025-01-01 --top 5`). Output: community_maintainers.csv.
limitation: Read-only. Requires a community artifact (built with communities enabled). If commits.jsonl is absent, --repo must be supplied in CM_ARGS so git history can be read.
